name: academorix/payment
purpose: Payment capture engine — PaymentIntent, Payment, PaymentMethod, and PaymentDispute aggregates mirroring provider payment lifecycles.
capabilities: Payment (pay_ prefix) — the successful capture record
when_to_use: A customer pays for an order or invoice and needs the intent-to-capture lifecycle recorded.
when_not_to_use: For gateway configuration and webhook ingestion, use academorix/gateway. For refunds, use academorix/refund.
